name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_Domain
title: R5: domain additional types
description: R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (text)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `MedicinalProduct.domain` 0..1 `Coding`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicinalProduct.domain` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.domain` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.
